axe_findings.title: `[aria-hidden="true"]` elements contain focusable descendents
axe_findings.description: Focusable descendents within an `[aria-hidden="true"]` element prevent those interactive elements from being available to users of assistive technologies like screen readers. [Learn how `aria-hidden` affects focusable elements](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/aria-hidden-focus).

items.explanation:
Fix all of the following:
  Focusable content should be disabled or be removed from the DOM

axe_findings.title: Background and foreground colors do not have a sufficient contrast ratio.
axe_findings.description: Low-contrast text is difficult or impossible for many users to read. [Learn how to provide sufficient color contrast](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/color-contrast).

items.explanation:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.19 (foreground color: #69beaa, background color: #ffffff, font size: 10.5pt (14px), font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

axe_findings.title: Links rely on color to be distinguishable.
axe_findings.description: Low-contrast text is difficult or impossible for many users to read. Link text that is discernible improves the experience for users with low vision. [Learn how to make links distinguishable](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/link-in-text-block).

items.explanation:
Fix any of the following:
  The link has insufficient color contrast of 2.33:1 with the surrounding text. (Minimum contrast is 3:1, link text: #00748d, surrounding text: #333333)
  The link has no styling (such as underline) to distinguish it from the surrounding text
